name: marketingskills_prompts
description: Reusable prompt pack derived from the marketingskills capability.

prompts.name: copywriting_optimization
prompts.template: Improve this marketing copy for higher engagement and conversion: {content_data}
prompts.use_case: Enhancing advertising copy effectiveness with AI-generated suggestions.

prompts.name: seo_analysis_request
prompts.template: Analyze the SEO performance of the following website and suggest improvements: {website_url}
prompts.use_case: Conducting SEO audits and improving website ranking via automated recommendations.

prompts.name: conversion_rate_insights
prompts.template: Given the following analytics data, provide insights to improve conversion rates: {analytics_data}
prompts.use_case: Leveraging analytics data to identify and increase conversion rates.

prompts.name: growth_strategy_planning
prompts.template: Suggest growth engineering strategies based on these marketing goals: {marketing_goals}
prompts.use_case: Creating scalable growth strategies using marketing data and AI agents.
